query: SELECT DISTINCT g.seasonId, s.name FROM games g LEFT JOIN seasons s ON g.seasonId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Sample%' LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Tr7sytVxCuD6SR.root --database Fde3d448vCxuYB8KePk65W --execute SELECT DISTINCT g.seasonId, s.name FROM games g LEFT JOIN seasons s ON g.seasonId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Sample%' LIMIT 5
